At New Design Pro, we transform spaces with quality and commitment.

With 10+ years of experience, we specialize in flooring installation, tile, carpentry, painting, and interior renovations for homes across the Disney corridor and Central Florida.

Our skilled team delivers clean, modern spaces with attention to detail — on time, on budget, and without the showroom markup.

LVP Pricing Tiers

All three tiers include LVP materials and professional install. Pick what fits your home.

Essential

$4.99/sqft
LVP + install, all-in.
  • LVP materials included
  • Foam underlayment
  • Professional installation
  • Transition strips
  • Job-site cleanup

Most Popular

Standard

$5.99/sqft
Everything in Essential, plus prep + quarter round.
  • Everything in Essential
  • Light subfloor leveling & sanding
  • Quarter round (closes baseboard gap)
  • Caulk & paint touch-ups
Click for full details →

Premium

$6.99/sqft
Everything in Standard, plus new baseboards.
  • Everything in Standard
  • New baseboards installed
  • Caulked & paint-ready
  • New transition strips

We Also Install

Pricing for tile, hardwood, and laminate is quoted per project — request a free walkthrough.

Tile

Porcelain, ceramic, large-format. Bathrooms, showers, kitchens, entryways.

Hardwood

Solid and engineered wide-plank hardwood. Click-lock or nail-down install.

Laminate

Budget-friendly alternative with the look of hardwood. Great for high-traffic areas.

What We Do

Flooring Installation

Luxury vinyl plank starting at $4.99/sqft with materials. We also install tile, laminate, and hardwood.

Tile Work

Floor tile, shower walls, kitchen backsplash, accent walls. Porcelain, ceramic, large-format.

Carpentry & Trim

Baseboards, crown molding, wainscoting, wood paneling, door & window trim, finish carpentry.

Interior Painting

Interior wall and ceiling painting, accent walls, trim painting. Clean lines, premium finishes.

Kitchen & Bathroom Redesign

Tile, vanity swap, fixture upgrades, backsplash, flooring — cosmetic redesigns that transform the space.

Custom Renovations

Project-based interior renovations tailored to your home. Walkthrough first, quote second.

Why I Do This

The story behind New Design Pro

My father, Ribamar, started this business in 2015. I was 15 when he handed me a caulk gun and told me to start there. I followed him onto every job site I could — not because I had to. Because I wanted to be near him while he built things.

He taught me every trade. Framing, flooring, drywall, paint, tile, trim. But more than the tools, he taught me how to look a client in the eye. How to walk a job and see what nobody else sees. How to treat the helper having a bad day the same way you treat the homeowner writing the check.

He told me a business is only as strong as the purpose behind it.

In 2025, he moved back to Brazil to open his own carpentry factory. I had to decide — quit, or rebuild.

I rebuilt. New crew. Same standards he drilled into me. Every job I take, I take it like he's still watching.

That's what you're hiring when you call us.

— Daniel Vieira, Owner

About the name. Huios is Greek for mature sons of God. It's the standard I hold myself to on every job — showing up, finishing clean, and standing behind the work.

Bilingual service: Falamos Português · Hablamos Español
